calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Jan-24-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony and Declaration of Plaintiff's Witness: Ernest Knowle, filed Jan. 10, 2006 in the court's file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: D Y Chung Corporation dba Livingstone Cleaners; Soo Jin Chung and Dae Young Chung as follows:
Principal $83,985.14
Prejudgment Interest $2,093.00
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $445.50, for a total of $89,023.64
Judgment signed in open court.
